activation.reason: The free translation optimization spans note parsing, provider behavior, persistent preferences, menu UI, tests, docs, and release gates.

objective: Implement safe google-free optimization by reusing local/manual meanings, adding bounded persistent cache and failure backoff, adding output quality gates, and exposing a cache-clear path without changing paid/BYO provider behavior.

assumptions.claim: Zotero preferences can store a small JSON string cache.
assumptions.verification: Unit tests mock Zotero.Prefs get/set with serialized cache JSON and release check exercises the built bundle.

assumptions.claim: Current-item manual meaning harvest is safer than global library scanning for this slice.
assumptions.verification: Spec non-goal and tests ensure only the selected generated wordbook note is used.

assumptions.claim: Paid/BYO providers must keep existing behavior.
assumptions.verification: Existing provider tests plus an explicit behavior-unchanged test for non-google-free menu path.

phases.name: Red tests
phases.entry_criteria: Spec and current code are readable; no production code for this feature has been written in this slice.
phases.exit_criteria: Focused tests fail because free translation memory/cache APIs and menu hooks do not exist.

phases.name: Memory helper
phases.entry_criteria: P1 red tests identify missing cache/normalization/quality gate behavior.
phases.exit_criteria: Pure memory/cache tests pass without touching note or menu code.

phases.name: Google-free provider integration
phases.exit_criteria: Translator tests cover persistent cache hits, success storage, failure markers, rate-limit markers, and rejected output.

phases.name: Wordbook local-memory fill
phases.exit_criteria: Note writer tests prove current-note manual meanings and persistent cache fill blanks without network calls.

phases.name: Menu and docs
phases.exit_criteria: Menu tests cover cache clear and google-free-only routing; docs match implemented behavior.

phases.name: Verification and review
phases.exit_criteria: npm run release:check passes and git diff excludes unrelated artifacts.

stop_conditions: implementation would require dependency or live API key

parallelism.fan_in_rule: Run implementation serially because tests and production files share the same small surfaces.
barriers: P1 red tests before production code
P6 release gate before completion claim

verification.falsifier: A test observes fetch called when current-note or persistent cache contains the meaning.

verification.claim_or_output: failure backoff prevents repeated blocked terms
verification.falsifier: A fresh failure marker still allows fetch for the same normalized term.
verification.evidence_required: translator or memory helper tests pass.

verification.falsifier: OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, or Anthropic tests fail or route through free cache.
XPI hash, manifest, update manifest, or docs mismatch.

invalidation_rules: Changing menu labels invalidates menu tests and locale checks.

first_slice.instruction: Add failing tests for free translation memory/cache behavior before writing production code.
first_slice.expected_output: red unit-test output showing missing freeTranslationMemory and google-free memory fill APIs
first_slice.completion_check: npm run test:unit fails for the new tests for the expected missing APIs
